name: monorepo-manager
description: Monorepo workflow management tool for Claude Code. Supports Turborepo, Nx, pnpm workspaces, Yarn workspaces, and Lerna.
author: jojaeyong

commands.name: workspace-add
commands.description: Add a new package or app to the monorepo with proper configuration

commands.name: affected
commands.description: Analyze affected packages from recent changes

agents.name: workspace-analyzer
agents.description: Scan monorepo structure, map packages and their relationships

agents.name: dependency-graph
agents.description: Build and visualize cross-package dependency graph, detect circular dependencies
